fields.protectionNotes: Threat model centers on adversarial claimants: manipulated narratives and documents crafted to suppress fraud scores.
fields.encryptionNotes: AES-256 at rest (SSE + CMK in Key Vault); TLS 1.2+ in transit; PII fields tokenized before feature store.
fields.accessNotes: Scoring service runs under its own managed identity with least privilege; adjusters see scores via existing ClaimCenter roles; no direct model access.
fields.auditNotes: Every score, referral, and override logged immutably (append-only storage, 7-year retention) with model version and feature snapshot.
fields.injectionNotes: Claim narratives are untrusted input: isolated from system instructions, length-limited, and the LLM feature output is schema-validated before entering the score.
